leadText: The Super Lure (Japanese: シルバーコロン Silver Cologne) is a type of item introduced in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. The Lure and Max Lure are alternate versions of this item.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag in the overworld, it increases encounter rates of rarer wild Pokémon , including Shiny Pokémon , for 200 steps . It also causes all wild Pokémon spawned to have a level 1 greater than the highest level normally in the area (for example, if an area's wild Pokémon normally range from level 3 to level 5, all wild Pokémon will be level 6 instead).

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A glass bottle of perfume that makes rare Pokémon more likely to appear. It lasts longer than a Lure. S V A bottle of perfume that makes rare Pokémon more likely to appear when sprayed about. Its effect lasts longer than that of a Lure.
